lily-stand-light-punch.name: Standing Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled
lily-stand-light-punch.notes_sc: Chains into 5LP/5LK/2LP/2LK; more damage than other light attacks; DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

lily-stand-medium-punch.name: Standing Medium Punch
lily-stand-medium-punch.notes_sc: Strong poke with great range and hitbox priority; no head hurtbox on frames 8-25

lily-stand-heavy-punch.name: Standing Heavy Punch
notes: Produces a crumple stun on Punish Counter if the opponent is standing on the ground
Forces a juggle state on Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent
lily-stand-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Punish Counter crumple state is +5 before opponent becomes airborne and +28 to land a juggle follow-up; Punish Counter puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state (requires very precise timing); extends a large hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles; no head hurtbox on frames 9-34; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame; Lily's best link after Punish Counter 5LP due to its range and damage

lily-stand-light-kick.name: Standing Light Kick
notes: Can be rapid canceled
lily-stand-light-kick.notes_sc: Chains into 5LP/5LK/2LP/2LK; true blockstring when chained from 2LK; Lily's fastest button but incredibly short range

lily-stand-medium-kick.name: Standing Medium Kick
lily-stand-medium-kick.notes_sc: Combo tool (primarily for counter-hit links); decent neutral buffer that can go over low pokes and has low whiff recovery

lily-stand-heavy-kick.name: Standing Heavy Kick
notes: Forces a juggle state on Punish Counter
lily-stand-heavy-kick.notes_sc: Solid poke with good range and high pushback; useful whiff punish due to the Punish Counter knockdown; Punish Counter puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles

lily-crouch-light-punch.name: Crouching Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled
lily-crouch-light-punch.notes_sc: Chains into 5LP/5LK/2LP/2LK; great range for a light attack; topmost hurtbox on frames 1-8 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air); DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

lily-crouch-medium-punch.name: Crouching Medium Punch
lily-crouch-medium-punch.notes_sc: Strong poke with great hitbox priority; can buffer into Super Arts (SA2 is likely to whiff if buffered as a counterpoke); topmost hurtbox on frames 1-10 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air)

lily-crouch-heavy-punch.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state on counter or Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent
lily-crouch-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Counter-hit/Punish Counter puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; incredible anti-air hitbox but cannot hit cross-up; ; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 4th active frame (2nd active frame of 2nd hit); has an extended hurtbox on whiff until the end of recovery

lily-crouch-light-kick.name: Crouching Light Kick
notes: Can be rapid canceled

lily-crouch-medium-kick.name: Crouching Medium Kick
lily-crouch-medium-kick.notes_sc: Slow and stubby compared to most cancelable 2MKs in the game; Range: 1.364; special/DR cancel is delayed until after active frames

lily-crouch-heavy-kick.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
notes: Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
Second attack is considered a high attack only when the first attack is blocked

lily-jump-medium-punch.name: Jumping Medium Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
lily-jump-medium-punch.notes_sc: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; decent hitbox priority for horizontal jump-in approaches (longest horizontal range of all Lily's air normals) cancel window into Condor Dive and Air SA2 is longer, enabling some juggles that would whiff if canceled early; lower body projectile invuln 9-22f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

lily-jump-heavy-punch.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
lily-jump-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Causes spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents; good downward hitbox priority for close range jump-ins; lower body projectile invuln 10-15f (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

lily-jump-light-kick.name: Jumping Light Kick
notes: Has cross-up attack properties

lily-jump-medium-kick.name: Jumping Medium Kick
notes: Has cross-up attack properties
lily-jump-medium-kick.notes_sc: Cross-up; lower body projectile invuln 8-22f and 8-12f around the kicking foot (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

lily-jump-heavy-kick.name: Jumping Heavy Kick
lily-jump-heavy-kick.notes_sc: Lower body projectile invuln 11-26f (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

condor-wind-light.name: Condor Wind (Light)
notes: Twirl your clubs above your head to summon and envelop yourself in wind. This will grant you one Windclad stock, which powers up certain special moves
Adds 1 stock of Windclad on frame 46 if the button is released in the fastest situation
Adds 1 stock on frames 71 and 91 if the button is held
Changes the properties of Condor Spire, Tomahawk Buster, Condor Dive, Thunderbird and Sky Thunderbird after a stock is added

condor-wind-medium.name: Condor Wind (Medium)
notes: Twirl your clubs above your head to summon and envelop yourself in wind. This will grant you one Windclad stock, which powers up certain special moves
Adds 1 stock of Windclad on the 1st active frame of the attack if the button is released by frame 45
If the button is held, adds a Windclad stock on frames 46, 71 and 91
Changes the properties of Condor Spire, Tomahawk Buster, Condor Dive, Thunderbird and Sky Thunderbird after a stock is added
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

condor-wind-heavy.name: Condor Wind (Heavy)
notes: Twirl your clubs above your head to summon and envelop yourself in wind. This will grant you one Windclad stock, which powers up certain special moves
Adds 1 stock of Windclad on the 1st active frame of the attack if the button is released by frame 45
If the button is held, adds a Windclad stock on frames 46, 71 and 91
Changes the properties of Condor Spire, Tomahawk Buster, Condor Dive, Thunderbird and Sky Thunderbird after a stock is added

condor-wind-od.name: Condor Wind (OD)
notes: Twirl your clubs above your head to summon and envelop yourself in wind. This will grant you one Windclad stock, which powers up certain special moves
Adds 1 stock of Windclad on the 1st active frame of the attack if the button is released by frame 25
If the button is held, adds a Windclad stock on frames 38, or for the full 40 frames of the move
Changes the properties of Condor Spire, Tomahawk Buster, Condor Dive, Thunderbird and Sky Thunderbird after a stock is added

condor-spire-light.name: Condor Spire (Light)
notes: Leap into the air and charge forward while remaining low to the ground. Useful as a way of approaching from a distance
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 30

condor-spire-medium.name: Condor Spire (Medium)
notes: Leap into the air and charge forward while remaining low to the ground. Useful as a way of approaching from a distance
Considered airborne from frames 9 - 35

condor-spire-heavy.name: Condor Spire (Heavy)
notes: Leap into the air and charge forward while remaining low to the ground. Useful as a way of approaching from a distance
Considered airborne from frames 11 - 39

condor-spire-od.name: Condor Spire (OD)
notes: Leap into the air and charge forward while remaining low to the ground. Useful as a way of approaching from a distance
Considered airborne from frames 7 - 29
Can only be canceled by Level 2 Super Art Thunderbird

windclad-condor-spire-light.name: [Windclad] Condor Spire (Light)
windclad-condor-spire-light.name_ja: [風纏い] コンドルスパイア (弱)
notes: Considered airborne from frames 9 - 39

windclad-condor-spire-medium.name: [Windclad] Condor Spire (Medium)
windclad-condor-spire-medium.name_ja: [風纏い] コンドルスパイア (中)
notes: Considered airborne from frames 13 - 43

windclad-condor-spire-heavy.name: [Windclad] Condor Spire (Heavy)
windclad-condor-spire-heavy.name_ja: [風纏い] コンドルスパイア (強)
notes: Considered airborne from frames 17 - 47

windclad-condor-spire-od.name: [Windclad] Condor Spire (OD)
windclad-condor-spire-od.name_ja: [風纏い] コンドルスパイア (OD)
notes: Leap into the air and charge forward while remaining low to the ground. Useful as a way of approaching from a distance
Considered airborne from frames 9 - 34
Invincible to projectiles from frames 9 - 32
Can only be canceled by level 2 Super Art Sky Thunderbird

tomahawk-buster-light.name: Tomahawk Buster (Light)
tomahawk-buster-light.name_ja: トマホークバスター (弱)
notes: Use the momentum of swinging your arms to diagonally leap into the air with a tackle. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 10
Considered airborne from frames 7 - 37

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 10

tomahawk-buster-medium.name: Tomahawk Buster (Medium)
tomahawk-buster-medium.name_ja: トマホークバスター (中)
notes: Use the momentum of swinging your arms to diagonally leap into the air with a tackle. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 12
Considered airborne from frames 9 - 44

tomahawk-buster-heavy.name: Tomahawk Buster (Heavy)
tomahawk-buster-heavy.name_ja: トマホークバスター (強)
notes: Use the momentum of swinging your arms to diagonally leap into the air with a tackle. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack
Invincible to mid-air attacks on frames 1- 14
Considered airborne from frames 11 - 49

tomahawk-buster-od.name: Tomahawk Buster (OD)
notes: Use the momentum of swinging your arms to diagonally leap into the air with a tackle. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 11 - 14
Invincible to throws from frames 1 - 10
Considered airborne from frames 7 - 45
Can only transition into Overdrive Condor Dive

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 11 - 14

notes: Use the momentum of swinging your arms to diagonally leap into the air with a tackle. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 10
Considered airborne from frames 7 - 37

notes: Use the momentum of swinging your arms to diagonally leap into the air with a tackle. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 12
Considered airborne from frames 9 - 44

notes: Use the momentum of swinging your arms to diagonally leap into the air with a tackle. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14
Considered airborne from frames 11 - 49

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14

windclad-tomahawk-buster-od.name: [Windclad] Tomahawk Buster (OD)
windclad-tomahawk-buster-od.name_ja: [風纏い] トマホークバスター (OD)
notes: Use the momentum of swinging your arms to diagonally leap into the air with a tackle. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 11 - 14
Invincible to throws from frames 1 - 10
Considered airborne from frames 7 - 45
Can only transition into Overdrive Condor Dive

condor-dive.name: Condor Dive
notes: While airborne, diagonally descend with a powerful tackle. Useful for making surprise attacks from the air or as a way to counterattack someone after dodging a projectile
Has cross-up attack properties
condor-dive.notes_sc: Usable during neutral/forward jump, or canceled from 623PP on hit; final active frame has an expanded downward hitbox; can hit cross-up

condor-dive-od.name: Condor Dive (OD)
notes: During a neutral of forward jump
During Tomahawk Buster OD
While airborne, diagonally descend with a powerful tackle. Useful for making surprise attacks from the air or as a way to counterattack someone after dodging a projectile
Has cross-up attack properties
If transitioned from Overdrive Tomahawk Buster, combo scaling is 35%

windclad-condor-dive.name: [Windclad] Condor Dive
windclad-condor-dive.name_ja: [風纏い] コンドルダイブ
notes: A more powerful Condor Dive. Can also be used after an OD Tomahawk Buster
Has cross-up attack properties
When the first attack hits, the 2nd hit will happen on the next frame

windclad-condor-dive-od.name: [Windclad] Condor Dive (OD)
windclad-condor-dive-od.name_ja: [風纏い] コンドルダイブ (OD)
notes: During a neutral of forward jump
During Tomahawk Buster OD
Has cross-up attack properties
When the first attack hits, the 2nd hit will happen on the next frame
If transitioned from Overdrive Tomahawk Buster, combo scaling is 35%

mexican-typhoon-light.name: Mexican Typhoon (Light)
mexican-typhoon-light.name_ja: メキシカンタイフーン (弱)
notes: When near opponent
Grab your opponent with both war clubs and smash them into the ground with a spinning slam. Useful for slipping through an opponent's guard at close range
Damage set to 2300 on Punish Counter

mexican-typhoon-medium.name: Mexican Typhoon (Medium)
mexican-typhoon-medium.name_ja: メキシカンタイフーン (中)
notes: When near opponent
Grab your opponent with both war clubs and smash them into the ground with a spinning slam. Useful for slipping through an opponent's guard at close range
Damage set to 2760 on Punish Counter

mexican-typhoon-heavy.name: Mexican Typhoon (Heavy)
mexican-typhoon-heavy.name_ja: メキシカンタイフーン (強)
notes: When near opponent
Grab your opponent with both war clubs and smash them into the ground with a spinning slam. Useful for slipping through an opponent's guard at close range
With Classic Controls
Does 3220 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
With Modern Controls
Does 3220 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
Does 2576 individual damage using simplified inputs

mexican-typhoon-od.name: Mexican Typhoon (OD)
mexican-typhoon-od.name_ja: メキシカンタイフーン (OD)
notes: When near opponent
Grab your opponent with both war clubs and smash them into the ground with a spinning slam. Useful for slipping through an opponent's guard at close range
With Classic Controls
Does 3350 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
With Modern Controls
Does 3350 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
Does 2680 individual damage using simplified inputs

breezing-hawk.name: Breezing Hawk
notes: After the attack begins, you'll unleash a series of spinning attacks centered around your opponent. It is slow to come out, but it does lots of damage and is invincible at the start
Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 14
Transitions to the full animation on the 2nd hit
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%

invuln.strike_throw: Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 14

breezing-hawk.notes_sc: First 2 hits give full animation; partial connect gives reduced damage and KD advantage; Dmg distribution: 80x13,1160 (full animation), 80x2,1680 (partial animation)

thunderbird.name: Thunderbird
notes: Remaining in place, leap directly upwards while unleashing a series of spinning attacks. It executes quickly, making it useful as an anti-air attack or as a way to turn the tables while doing lots of damage
Fully invincible from frames 1 - 41
Considered airborne from frames 7 - 80
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%
thunderbird.notes_sc: Connects 7 times vs. stand block, 5 times vs. crouch block (affects Block Adv, Chip Damage, and Drive Damage); hits on both sides of Lily (good anti-air against cross-ups); must be Perfect Parried twice (3 times for tall standing characters); suction effect on hit (can be used against extended projectile hurtboxes); Dmg distribution: 100x7,1900

windclad-thunderbird.name: [Windclad] Thunderbird
windclad-thunderbird.name_ja: [風纏い] サンダーバード
notes: Thunderbird performed while airborne. It is primarily useful as a way to finish air combos
Fully invincible from frames 1 - 41
Considered airborne from frames 7 - 80
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%

soaring-thunderbird.name: Soaring Thunderbird
soaring-thunderbird.name_ja: スカイサンダーバード
notes: Thunderbird performed while airborne. It is primarily useful as a way to finish air combos
Fully invincible from frames 1 - 41
Considered airborne
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%
soaring-thunderbird.notes_sc: 2f startup if canceled from OD Condor Spire (this version's Full Invuln lasts 1-41f); total recovery time before landing depends on activation height; hits on both sides of Lily; if input after a cross-up jump, Lily turns to face the opponent (can be used to escape anti-air punish after jumping out of corner); Dmg distribution: 100x7,1900

windclad-soaring-thunderbird.name: [Windclad] Soaring Thunderbird
windclad-soaring-thunderbird.name_ja: [風纏い] スカイサンダーバード
notes: Thunderbird performed while airborne. It is primarily useful as a way to finish air combos
Fully invincible from frames 1 - 41
Considered airborne
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%

raging-typhoon.name: Raging Typhoon
raging-typhoon.name_ja: レイジングタイフーン
notes: When near opponent
A more powerful Mexican Typhoon in which you smash your opponent into the ground twice. Can be used to slip through an opponent's guard at close range and deal tons of damage all at once
Fully invincible from frames 1 - 8
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
raging-typhoon.notes_sc: Can be jumped out of during startup; can be comboed into like a hit-grab (immediate damage scaling applies to any combo into SA3); cinematic time regenerates ~1.7 Drive bars for Lily; Range: 1.728 (1.755 on 2nd active frame)

raging-typhoon-ca.name: Raging Typhoon (Critical Art)
raging-typhoon-ca.name_ja: レイジングタイフーン (CA)
notes: When under 25% vitality
A more powerful Mexican Typhoon in which you smash your opponent into the ground twice. Can be used to slip through an opponent's guard at close range and deal tons of damage all at once
Fully invincible from frames 1 - 8
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%

ridge-thrust.name: Ridge Thrust
notes: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching
Invincible to low attacks from frames 5 - 19
ridge-thrust.notes_sc: Good range and hitbox priority for an overhead; Lily is in a crouching state on frames 25-42 (only the final 3f of recovery has a standing hurtbox); causes spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents

horn-breaker.name: Horn Breaker
notes: An attack with long reach that can be canceled into special moves
horn-breaker.notes_sc: Good range, strong hitbox priority (strong bufferable neutral tool); extends a hurtbox in front of body until the end of recovery

great-spin.name: Great Spin
notes: A body press with an area of attack so wide that it can hit an opponent even if it crosses over them
Has cross-up attack properties
great-spin.notes_sc: Cross-up; can be used from any jump direction; extended backwards hurtbox is projectile invuln 9-19f

double-arrow.name: Double Arrow
notes: A combination attack that is useful against jumping opponents
Forces a juggle state on a mid-air hit
Can only be canceled by Level 2 Super Art Thunderbird
double-arrow.notes_sc: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state

desert-storm-1.name: Desert Storm (1)
notes: A sequence of attacks that deals big damage
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

desert-storm-2.name: Desert Storm (2)
notes: A sequence of attacks that deals big damage
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

desert-storm-3.name: Desert Storm (3)
notes: A sequence of attacks that deals big damage

canyon-throw.name: Canyon Throw
notes: When near opponent
Grab an opponent's leg with your war clubs and toss them into the air. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
canyon-throw.notes_sc: Can Drive Rush for a corner strike/throw mixup; has a true walking throw loop vs. Blanka/E.Honda/Zangief that requires frame perfect timing; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

falling-cliff.name: Falling Cliff
notes: When near opponent
Grab an opponent's head between your war clubs and toss them behind you. Throws your opponent while switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
falling-cliff.notes_sc: Side switch; requires Drive Rush to land another meaty throw after cornering opponent; can also use immediate 236MK to become +4 on block for a mixup (or Windclad 236LK to become +3); forward dash can set up a meaty normal but no real throw mixup; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously
